Ted Lindquist, III, (415)722-3688 for Reponsent Brian McGonigle.

Argued. The Court rules as follows: RECEIVER, GREGORY STERLING's Motion For Interim Approval Of Receivers Fees is GRANTED as request. Having considered all the papers in support of and in opposition to the motion the court concurs with the receiver's responses to Mr. McGonigle's objections and arguments and grants as requested Receiver's motion for approval of fees. Receiver to prepare order. Order signed in Open Court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Off Calendar Jan-09-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
William Bunting III, Esq. (415-617-0244) for Petitioner/party Paolo Mancini.
Ted Linquist, Esq. (415-722-3688) for Respondent/opposing party Brian McGonigle.
Gregory Sterling (408-354-9797) Other Party /Moving party GREGORY (RECEIVER) STERLING in Pro Per.

The Court indicates Respondent has not filed papers timely, and will not consider any papers or any arguments. The Court concurs with opposing counsel and has concluded that it will adopt what opposing party has indicated. All parties ARGUED. Respondent apologizes re: family issues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

OTHER GREGORY (RECEIVER) STERLING's Motion For Further Instructions.The Court concurs with Petitioner's opposition to Receiver's Request as follows: (1) The Court affirms its 7/6/16 Order; and (2) adopts answers to the Receiver's questions on pages 1 and 2 of opposition. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)

Notice Of Application And Application To Appoint A Receiver Pursuant To Ccp 564 And 1281.8
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
William Bunting, III, (415)617-0244 for Petitioner/Moving party Paolo Mancini.
Ted Lindquit, (415)722-3688 for Respondant/Opposing party Brian McGonigle.

Argued by counsel for both parties. The Court rules as follows: PETITIONER PAOLO MANCINI Notice Of Application And Application To Appoint A Receiver Pursuant To Ccp 564 And 1281.8 Re: appointment of receiver is Taken Under Submission. The Court orders counsel to meet and confer and to submitt an order regarding 1) the status and terms of the written agreement and 2) the limited scope of the receiver. The Court informs counsel that if the order is not received by May 25, 2016 the Court will make a ruling by Friday May 27, 2016. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Application And Application To Appoint A Receiver Pursuant To Ccp 564 And 1281.8
Off Calendar May-13-2016 Continued To May-20-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER'S APPLICATION TO APPOINT A RECEIVER

Appearances: William Bunting III of Bunting Drayton & Alward LLP (415.617.0244) for respondent and opposing party. No other appearances.

The Court informs Mr. Bunting that petitioner's counsel has been prevented from coming to Court today. The Court will continue the matter to a date agreed upon by counsel. May 20, 23, and 24 are the next available dates for hearing. Counsel to call and inform the clerk which date the parties have agreed on. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported

*** After hearing Mr. Bunting informs the Court the parties have agreed to continue the matter to May 20, 2016. ***

Notice Of Application And Application To Appoint A Receiver Pursuant To Ccp 564 And 1281.8
Off Calendar Apr-29-2016 Continued To May-13-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Douglas Drayton, Esq. (415-617-0244) for Plaintiff/Moving party PAOLO MANCINI.
Ted Lindquist III, Esq. (415-399-1159) for Defendant/opposing party Brian McGonigle.

The Court announces his questions: status of "foreclosure", possible extension on the note, possible pay off of the note. Hearing is held. Both sides Argued. The Court takes a recess at 10:15 am for parties to prepare a written agreement. 10:33 am Court resumes. Parties report they have a written agreement. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PETITIONER PAOLO MANCINI's Application To Appoint A Receiver Pursuant To Ccp 564 And 1281.8
is continued to May 13, 2016 at 9:30 am in Dept. 501. Counsel to advise Court to take matter off calendar if matter is resolved. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
